caption: A man with a distinctive tall, greyish-blonde hairstyle and glasses is seated at a podcast desk, wearing a white shirt, suspenders, and a bow tie. He wears large black headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, a woman wearing a black face mask and a black t-shirt stands in the background, looking at her phone. The setting is an office or studio with a framed logo on the wall and "UNIQUE FASHIONS" visible in the background. The on-screen graphics include a logo and the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking and begins to gesture with his hand, while the woman in the background shifts her posture and continues interacting with her phone.
